title: Lively Dutch Lentil Stew
description: A peppery, comforting Dutch lentil stew with a tangy twist from Branston pickle, perfect for plant‑based diners. The broth is rich and the lentils remain pleasantly chewy.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the chopped carrots, celery, and smoked paprika, cooking for 3 minutes.
Add the dried lentils, diced tomatoes, dried thyme and vegetable broth, bringing to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Stir in the Branston pickle and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Remove from heat and let the stew sit for 5 minutes to thicken.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with fresh herbs or a drizzle of olive oil.
Enjoy this hearty, peppery Dutch lentil stew as a comforting dinner.
